clusters.justification: These terms share robust co-activation within the salience and interoceptive networks, representing the overarching domain of emotional states, mood processing, and physiological arousal.
These terms map onto mesolimbic-striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, reflecting the systemic computation of subjective utility, incentive salience, and goal-directed drive.

These terms reliably co-activate within the overarching default mode network, representing an axis of internally directed mentation dedicated to processing the self, social constructs, and interpersonal dynamics.
